name: Tier simulation — judge connects, reaches live test, switches Guest to Pro

planSteps.description: Click the button 'Continue as judge — use demo tenant' and wait up to 60 seconds for the 'Foundry inventory' browser to load

Proceed through the tier configuration flow: look for and click the primary continue/next button(s) that lead from the inventory browser toward the live test step (step 3). Accept any pre-filled defaults.
The live test page loads: heading 'Test your chatbot live' is visible
A section titled 'Simulate user tier' is visible with clickable tier cards labeled 'Guest', 'Logged-in', and 'Pro'
The 'Pro' tier card becomes the active/selected card (visually highlighted, aria-pressed true), demonstrating tier switching between user access levels
